code: import{createSlice}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';var initialState={isLogin:false,isLoginFormOpen:false,isRegisterActive:false,userInfo:{username:''},profileUpdateActive:false};var accountSlice=createSlice({name:'account',initialState:initialState,reducers:{handleLogin:function handleLogin(state){state.isLogin=true;},handleLogout:function handleLogout(state){state.isLogin=false;state.userInfo.username='';},openLoginForm:function openLoginForm(state,action){action.payload?state.isLoginFormOpen=false:state.isLoginFormOpen=!state.isLoginFormOpen;},switchLoginToRegister:function switchLoginToRegister(state){state.isRegisterActive=!state.isRegisterActive;},storeUser:function storeUser(state,action){state.userInfo.username=action.payload.username;},setProfileUpdateActive:function setProfileUpdateActive(state){state.profileUpdateActive=!state.profileUpdateActive;}}});var _accountSlice$actions=accountSlice.actions,openLoginForm=_accountSlice$actions.openLoginForm,closeLoginForm=_accountSlice$actions.closeLoginForm,switchLoginToRegister=_accountSlice$actions.switchLoginToRegister,handleLogin=_accountSlice$actions.handleLogin,handleLogout=_accountSlice$actions.handleLogout,storeUser=_accountSlice$actions.storeUser,setProfileUpdateActive=_accountSlice$actions.setProfileUpdateActive;export{openLoginForm,closeLoginForm,switchLoginToRegister,handleLogin,handleLogout,storeUser,setProfileUpdateActive};export var accountSelector=function accountSelector(state){return state.account;};export default accountSlice.reducer;
